scenes.npcDialog: Good morning! May I see your passport and booking confirmation?
Do you have a seat preference? Window or aisle?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 좌석 선호가 있으신가요? 창가 아니면 통로?

choices.text: I want to sit on the wing.

scenes.npcDialog: How many bags are you checking in today?

choices.text: I want to check in myself.

scenes.npcDialog: Please place your laptop and liquids in a separate tray.
Please step aside. Do you have anything metal in your pockets?

choices.text: Oh, I forgot my belt. Let me remove it.
I might have some coins. Here they are.

scenes.npcDialog: Can I help you find something?

choices.text: I'm looking for my gate. It's gate 25.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like to see anything in particular?
We're now boarding rows 20 to 35. May I see your boarding pass?
Can I help you find your seat?
Let me help you with your bag. Is this your carry-on?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 가방 넣는 것 도와드릴게요. 이게 기내용 가방인가요?

scenes.npcDialog: What would you like to drink? We have juice, water, coffee, and tea.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 음료는 뭘로 드릴까요? 주스, 물, 커피, 차가 있습니다.

scenes.npcDialog: For your meal, would you like beef or chicken?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 식사로 소고기와 닭고기 중 뭘로 드릴까요?

scenes.npcDialog: Is there anything else I can get for you?

choices.text: Could I get a blanket, please?
I want to sleep in first class.

scenes.npcDialog: Excuse me, the seatbelt sign is on. Could you wait a moment?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 죄송합니다, 안전벨트 사인이 켜져있어요. 잠시 기다려주시겠어요?

choices.text: Okay, I'll go back to my seat.
I don't care about the sign.

scenes.npcDialog: Do you need help filling out the arrival card?

choices.text: Yes, what should I write for 'purpose of visit'?
Where do I write my hotel address?

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like headphones for the entertainment system?

choices.text: That would be great, thank you.

scenes.npcDialog: Please return to your seat and fasten your seatbelt. We're experiencing turbulence.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 좌석으로 돌아가 안전벨트를 매주세요. 난기류가 있습니다.

choices.text: Okay, I'll sit down right away.
Is it going to be a rough ride?

scenes.npcDialog: We'll be landing in 30 minutes. Please put your tray table up and seat in the upright position.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 30분 후 착륙합니다. 테이블을 접고 좌석을 바로 세워주세요.

choices.text: Okay, thank you for letting me know.

scenes.npcDialog: What is the purpose of your visit?
How long will you be staying?

choices.text: I'll be here for two weeks.

scenes.npcDialog: Where will you be staying?

choices.text: I'm staying at the Hilton Hotel.
At a hotel in the city center.

scenes.npcDialog: Do you have a return ticket?

choices.text: Yes, I'm flying back on the 15th.

scenes.npcDialog: Which carousel is your luggage on?

choices.text: I'm not sure. My flight was from Seoul.

scenes.npcDialog: Is there a problem with your luggage?

choices.text: Yes, my bag hasn't come out yet.
I can't find my suitcase. It's a black one.

scenes.npcDialog: How much would you like to exchange?

choices.text: Can I exchange 300 dollars to euros?

scenes.npcDialog: Today's rate is 1.08 euros per dollar. Is that okay?
How can I help you today?

choices.text: How do I get to the city center?
What's the best way to get downtown?

scenes.npcDialog: Where would you like to go?

choices.text: One ticket to Central Station, please.
How much is a ticket to the city center?

scenes.npcDialog: Good evening! Do you have a reservation?

choices.text: Yes, I have a reservation under Kim.
Yes, I booked online. Here's my confirmation.
No, but give me the best room.

scenes.npcDialog: Your room includes breakfast. It's served from 7 to 10 AM.

choices.text: Great, where is the breakfast room?
Perfect, thank you for the information.

scenes.npcDialog: Is there anything else you need?

choices.text: Could you tell me the WiFi password?

scenes.situation: 자유의 여신상 페리를 타고 리버티 섬으로 간다
scenes.npcDialog: Ferry to Liberty Island departing! Crown access requires advance tickets. The view from the pedestal is also amazing!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 리버티 섬행 페리 출발합니다! 왕관 입장은 사전 티켓 필요해요. 받침대에서 보는 경치도 멋져요!

choices.text: I have crown tickets! How many steps to the top?
The pedestal view sounds good! Is it crowded up there?

scenes.npcDialog: New York bagels! Plain, everything, sesame? Cream cheese, lox, or bacon egg cheese? We've been making these for 60 years!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 뉴욕 베이글이에요! 플레인, 에브리씽, 참깨? 크림치즈, 훈제연어, 베이컨에그치즈? 60년간 만들어왔어요!

choices.text: An everything bagel with cream cheese and lox please! The classic!
60 years! What makes New York bagels special?
It's just bread with a hole.

scenes.npcDialog: Harlem - the soul of Black culture in NYC! Sunday gospel at Abyssinian Baptist Church is incredible. Jazz clubs at night!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 할렘 - 뉴욕 흑인 문화의 영혼이에요! 일요일 에비시니안 침례교회 가스펠이 믿기 어려워요. 밤엔 재즈 클럽!

choices.text: Gospel service sounds amazing! Do I need to dress up?
Jazz in Harlem - the birthplace! Which club do you recommend?
I'm not into that kind of music.

scenes.npcDialog: Welcome! Are you here for a honeymoon?

choices.text: Yes! Do you have any honeymoon packages?
We just got married! What special offers do you have?

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like a professional photo session?

choices.text: Yes! We want honeymoon photos here.
That would be a wonderful memory. How much?

scenes.npcDialog: Breakfast is served from 7 to 10 AM.

choices.text: Can we get room service instead? We want to sleep in.
Is it possible to have breakfast in bed?

scenes.npcDialog: Good evening! Your room is ready. Would you like an upgrade to a suite for 50 euros more?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 안녕하세요! 객실 준비되었습니다. 50유로 추가하시면 스위트룸으로 업그레이드 가능한데요?

choices.text: That sounds nice. What does the suite include?
What's the difference between the rooms?
Give me the upgrade for free.

scenes.npcDialog: The regular line is about 2 hours. Would you like skip-the-line tickets?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 일반 줄은 약 2시간 기다려야 해요. 줄 안서는 티켓 원하세요?

choices.text: Yes, how much extra is it?
Definitely, I don't want to wait.
I should get VIP for free.

scenes.npcDialog: Empire State Building! 86th floor open-air deck. Sunrise tickets available - fewer crowds, incredible view of NYC waking up!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 엠파이어 스테이트 빌딩이에요! 86층 야외 전망대요. 선라이즈 티켓도 있어요 - 사람 적고 뉴욕이 깨어나는 멋진 전망!

choices.text: Sunrise sounds magical! What time would I need to arrive?
This is the building from so many movies! Can I see Central Park from here?
Observation decks are all the same.

scenes.npcDialog: The High Line! An elevated park on old railway tracks. 1.5 miles long with art installations and great city views!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 하이라인이에요! 오래된 철도 위에 만든 공중 공원이에요. 1.5마일 길이에 예술 작품과 도시 전망이 멋져요!

choices.text: What a creative use of old railway! Where's the best entrance?
Art installations too? This sounds unique! Any food vendors?
I'd rather walk on ground level.

scenes.situation: Top of the Rock 전망대에서 뉴욕 스카이라인을 본다
scenes.npcDialog: Top of the Rock! Many say the view is better than Empire State because you can SEE the Empire State Building from here!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 탑 오브 더 록이에요! 엠파이어 스테이트보다 전망이 낫다는 사람이 많아요 - 여기서 엠파이어 스테이트가 보이거든요!

choices.text: That makes sense! Empire State in the view is perfect! Is Central Park visible too?
Both directions - park and buildings? This is the spot!

scenes.npcDialog: Your honeymoon suite is ready. Would you like champagne sent up?

choices.text: That would be wonderful, thank you!

scenes.npcDialog: Interested in our romantic sunset cruise?

choices.text: That sounds magical! What time does it depart?
Is dinner included on the cruise?

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like us to decorate the room?

choices.text: Yes! Rose petals on the bed would be amazing.
Can you make a heart shape with flowers?

scenes.npcDialog: How may I assist you this evening?

choices.text: Could you recommend a nice restaurant nearby?
Can you make a reservation for me?
You should know what I want.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like to book a spa treatment?

choices.text: Yes, what massage options do you have?
I'd like a 60-minute deep tissue massage.
Spas are a waste of money.

scenes.npcDialog: Bike rental for Central Park! 1 hour, 2 hours, or full day. The loop around the park is 6 miles. Maps are free!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 센트럴파크 자전거 대여예요! 1시간, 2시간, 또는 하루 종일. 공원 한 바퀴가 6마일이에요. 지도는 무료!

choices.text: I'll take 2 hours! What are the must-see spots in the park?
6 miles sounds perfect! Is there a Bethesda Fountain route?

scenes.npcDialog: Fifth Avenue! Tiffany's, Saks, Apple Store flagship. Even if you're not buying, the window displays are art!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 5번가예요! 티파니, 삭스, 애플스토어 플래그십. 안 사더라도 윈도우 진열이 예술이에요!

choices.text: Breakfast at Tiffany's vibes! Can I look around inside?
The window displays are beautiful! When do they change?

scenes.npcDialog: Dim sum in Chinatown! Har gow, siu mai, char siu bao - carts come around, point at what you want. Very authentic!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 차이나타운 딤섬이에요! 하가우, 슈마이, 차슈바오 - 카트가 돌아다니면 원하는 거 가리키세요. 아주 정통이에요!

choices.text: Cart service sounds fun! What's the must-try dim sum?
I love har gow! Is this one of the famous dim sum places?

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like a table by the window for a romantic dinner?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 로맨틱 디너를 위해 창가 자리 드릴까요?

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like a private wine tasting tour?

choices.text: Yes! Is it just the two of us?
That sounds romantic. What wines do you feature?

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like a honeymoon certificate?

choices.text: Yes! That would be a nice keepsake.
Can you include our names and dates?

scenes.npcDialog: Room service, how may I help you?

choices.text: I'd like to order breakfast for tomorrow morning.
Could I get a bottle of wine sent up?
Bring me everything on the menu.

scenes.npcDialog: Are you visiting from abroad? You may be eligible for tax refund.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 해외에서 오셨나요? 택스 리펀 받으실 수 있어요.

choices.text: Yes, how do I get the tax refund?
Can you prepare the documents for me?
Just give me the discount now.

scenes.npcDialog: New York slice! Fold it in half like a real New Yorker. We got plain, pepperoni, and today's special - white pizza.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 뉴욕 슬라이스예요! 진짜 뉴요커처럼 반으로 접어서 드세요. 플레인, 페퍼로니, 오늘의 스페셜 - 화이트 피자 있어요.

choices.text: I'll try pepperoni! So I fold it? That's the authentic way?
One plain slice please! This looks like real New York pizza!

scenes.npcDialog: Chelsea Market! Lobster, tacos, gelato, bakeries - 35+ vendors. This building used to be the Oreo cookie factory!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 첼시 마켓이에요! 랍스터, 타코, 젤라또, 베이커리 - 35개 이상 가게. 이 건물은 원래 오레오 쿠키 공장이었어요!

choices.text: Oreo factory? That's cool history! What's the must-try food here?
I want to try the lobster! Is there seating inside?
Too many choices stresses me out.

scenes.npcDialog: SoHo! The cast-iron architecture is amazing. Boutiques, galleries, and great brunch spots. Very instagrammable!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 소호예요! 주철 건축물이 멋져요. 부티크, 갤러리, 브런치 맛집도 있어요. 인스타그램 하기 좋아요!

choices.text: The architecture is beautiful! Any local designer shops you recommend?
Perfect for photos! What's the best street to walk?
SoHo is too trendy for me.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like to book a couples massage?

choices.text: Yes! What packages do you have?

scenes.npcDialog: We have couples cooking classes and dance lessons.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 커플 요리 수업과 댄스 레슨이 있어요.

choices.text: A dance lesson sounds fun! What kind of dance?
We'd love to try the cooking class together!

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like to hide the ring in a dessert?

choices.text: That's perfect! Please keep it a secret!
Yes! What dessert do you recommend for this?

scenes.npcDialog: Welcome to business class check-in. May I see your passport?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 비즈니스 클래스 체크인에 오신 것을 환영합니다. 여권 보여주시겠어요?

choices.text: Here you go. Is the lounge open now?

scenes.npcDialog: Welcome to the lounge. May I see your boarding pass?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 라운지에 오신 것을 환영합니다. 탑승권 보여주시겠어요?

choices.text: Here you go. Where are the showers?
Is there a quiet area to work?

scenes.npcDialog: TKTS booth! Same-day Broadway tickets 20-50% off. Hamilton, Lion King, Wicked - what genre do you like?
scenes.npcDialogKo: TKTS 부스예요! 당일 브로드웨이 티켓 20-50% 할인. 해밀턴, 라이온킹, 위키드 - 어떤 장르 좋아하세요?

choices.text: I've always wanted to see Hamilton! Are there any tickets left?
What's playing tonight? I'm open to recommendations!
I don't understand English well enough.

scenes.npcDialog: The 9/11 Memorial. The reflecting pools sit where the Twin Towers stood. Names of all 2,977 victims are engraved here.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 9/11 메모리얼이에요. 반사 풀이 쌍둥이 빌딩이 있던 자리에 있어요. 2,977명 희생자 전원의 이름이 새겨져 있어요.

choices.text: This is such a moving place. How long should I plan to spend here?
The memorial is beautifully done. Is the museum worth visiting too?
I've read about it, that's enough.

scenes.npcDialog: Yankees game! Hot dog, beer, cracker jacks - the classic combo. 'New York, New York' after a win is unforgettable!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 양키스 경기예요! 핫도그, 맥주, 크래커잭 - 클래식 조합이에요. 이기면 '뉴욕, 뉴욕' 노래가 잊을 수 없어요!

choices.text: A Yankees game - bucket list checked! What should I order first?
I hope they win so I can hear the song! Where should I sit?

scenes.npcDialog: Is there anything special we can arrange for your partner?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 파트너를 위해 특별히 준비해드릴 것 있으세요?

choices.text: Can you put rose petals on the bed?
I'd like to surprise them with flowers in the room.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like engraving on this item?

choices.text: Yes! Can you put our names and wedding date?
That would be a perfect keepsake!
We won't remember this trip anyway.

scenes.npcDialog: Good evening. Do you have a reservation?

choices.text: Yes, reservation for Kim at 7 PM.
I booked a table for two.

scenes.npcDialog: Here's your rental car. Would you like additional insurance coverage?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 렌터카 여기 있습니다. 추가 보험 들으시겠어요?

choices.text: What does the full coverage include?
Yes, I'd like the comprehensive insurance.

scenes.npcDialog: Times Square - the Crossroads of the World! Those digital billboards cost $1-4 million per year. Best at night for photos!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 타임스 스퀘어 - 세계의 교차로예요! 저 디지털 광고판은 연간 1-4백만 달러예요. 사진은 밤에 찍는 게 최고!

choices.text: It's even more impressive in person! The lights are incredible!
I'll definitely come back at night for photos! Any tips?

scenes.npcDialog: Brooklyn Bridge walk! Best from Brooklyn to Manhattan - that way you walk toward the skyline. About 30 minutes each way.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 브루클린 다리 걷기! 브루클린에서 맨해튼 방향이 최고예요 - 스카이라인을 향해 걸어요. 편도 약 30분이에요.

choices.text: Walking toward Manhattan skyline sounds perfect! Is it crowded?
30 minutes with that view? I'm in! Where's the best photo spot?
I can see the bridge from the street.

scenes.npcDialog: Grand Central Terminal! Look up at the ceiling - it's a painted sky with zodiac constellations. The Whispering Gallery is fun to try!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 그랜드 센트럴 터미널이에요! 천장을 보세요 - 별자리가 그려진 하늘이에요. 속삭임 갤러리 체험해보세요!

choices.text: The ceiling is stunning! How does the Whispering Gallery work?
This station is like a palace! Is there a tour available?

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like a special cake for the occasion?

choices.text: Yes! Can it say 'Just Married' on it?
That would be lovely. What flavors do you have?

scenes.npcDialog: You can enjoy the massage together in the same room.
scenes.npcDialogKo: 같은 방에서 함께 마사지 받으실 수 있어요.

choices.text: Perfect! Do you have aromatherapy options?
Wonderful! How long is the treatment?

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like to try our tasting menu with wine pairing?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 와인 페어링과 함께하는 테이스팅 메뉴 드셔보시겠어요?

choices.text: That sounds wonderful. What wines are included?
Yes, please. Is there a vegetarian option?

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like valet parking for your vehicle?

choices.text: Yes, please. How much is it per day?
Valet parking is for lazy people.

scenes.situation: 세계 최대 미술관 중 하나를 탐험한다
scenes.npcDialog: The Met! Over 2 million artworks. Egyptian Temple of Dendur, European paintings, American wing... You could spend a week here!
scenes.npcDialogKo: 메트예요! 200만 점 이상의 작품이에요. 이집트 덴두르 신전, 유럽 회화, 미국관... 일주일도 부족해요!

choices.text: 2 million artworks! What are the highlights I shouldn't miss?
I want to see the Egyptian Temple! Is there a rooftop too?

scenes.npcDialog: Hot dog! Most New York thing ever. Mustard, ketchup, sauerkraut, onions? Only $2. Pretzel too?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 핫도그요! 가장 뉴욕다운 거예요. 머스타드, 케첩, 사워크라우트, 양파? 2달러밖에 안 해요. 프레첼도요?

choices.text: Mustard and sauerkraut please! This is the real NYC experience!
I'll have both! Nothing like a NYC street hot dog!

scenes.npcDialog: Room service. What can I get for you?

choices.text: A bottle of champagne and a flower bouquet, please.
Can you send up roses and strawberries?

scenes.npcDialog: Your candlelit table is ready.

choices.text: This is so romantic. Can we order wine?
I can't read the menu in this light.

scenes.npcDialog: Shall I call a taxi for you, or would you prefer to use the app?

choices.text: Please call a taxi. I'm going to the opera house.
I'll use the app. What's the address here?
I'll walk... no, actually drive me.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like us to deliver your luggage directly to your hotel?

choices.text: That would be great! How long does it take?
Yes, what time will it arrive?
Why would I pay for that?

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like access to our private beach?

choices.text: Yes! Can we reserve a cabana?
That sounds perfect for relaxing together.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like a room with an ocean view?

choices.text: Yes! That would be perfect for us.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like a private guide for your city tour?

choices.text: Yes, can the guide speak Korean?
How much is a private half-day tour?

scenes.npcDialog: Front desk, how may I help you?

choices.text: The air conditioning in my room isn't working.
I can't figure out how to adjust the temperature.

scenes.npcDialog: Housekeeping, can I help you?

choices.text: Could I get some extra towels, please?
I need more towels for my room.

scenes.npcDialog: Good morning! How can I assist you today?

choices.text: Could I get a late checkout?

scenes.npcDialog: Are you checking out today?

choices.text: Yes, I'd like to check out.

scenes.npcDialog: Would you like us to store your luggage?

choices.text: Yes, I'll pick it up around 3 PM.
That would be great. My flight is this evening.

scenes.npcDialog: Good evening! Table for how many?
Are you ready to order?

choices.text: Yes, I'll have the pasta, please.
Could I have a few more minutes?

scenes.npcDialog: What would you like to drink?

choices.text: I'll have a glass of water, please.
Could I see the wine list?

scenes.npcDialog: Do you have any food allergies?
Can I get you anything else?
How would you like to pay?

choices.text: Can I pay with credit card?

scenes.npcDialog: Where to?

choices.text: Can you take me to this address?

scenes.npcDialog: That'll be 25 euros.

choices.text: Here you go. Keep the change.

scenes.npcDialog: How can I help you?

choices.text: One ticket to Central Station, please.
How much is a day pass?
I want to ride for free.

scenes.npcDialog: Can I help you with directions?

choices.text: Does this bus go to the museum?
Which bus goes to the city center?

scenes.npcDialog: Excuse me, are you lost?

choices.text: Yes, I'm looking for the train station.
Could you tell me how to get to the museum?

scenes.npcDialog: Good morning! Where are you flying to today?

choices.text: I don't want to go home.

scenes.npcDialog: Last minute shopping? Can I help you find something?
scenes.npcDialogKo: 마지막 쇼핑하세요? 뭔가 찾는 거 도와드릴까요?

choices.text: I'm looking for some chocolate as a gift.
Do you have any local souvenirs?

scenes.npcDialog: Do you need a customs declaration form?

choices.text: Yes, please. What do I need to declare?
Do I need to declare gifts I bought?
